summary: P0 Bug Fix Verified: Bank name mismatch issue resolved. Agents now see ALL their own loans regardless of bank name mismatches (e.g., 'YES' vs 'YES BANK'). Managers see ALL team loans without bank/cat/prod filtering. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified MIS page loads correctly for Agent, Manager, and Admin roles.
passed_tests: Backend: Dhruvi login and verify assigned_banks contains 'YES' but not 'YES BANK'
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Dhruvi (assigned_banks=['YES']) sees loan with bank='YES BANK'
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Dhruvi sees ALL her own loans regardless of assigned_banks
Backend: P0 BUG FIX - Jyoti (manager) sees ALL team loans including bank='YES BANK'
Backend: Agent creates loan with mismatched bank and still sees it
Backend: Dhruvi analytics overview returns correct data
Backend: Dhruvi analytics unique-values includes 'YES BANK'
Backend: Jyoti analytics overview returns correct team data
Backend: Dhruvi search by customer name works
Backend: Admin sees all loans in the system
UI: Agent (Dhruvi) MIS page shows 2 loans including bank='YES BANK'
UI: Manager (Jyoti) Dashboard shows team loans with Bank-wise Analysis
UI: Admin Dashboard shows all 10 loans with full navigation menu

test_credentials.agent_dhruvi: dhruvi.shah@mhpfintech.com / Dhruvi@MHP (assigned_banks: HERO, YES; manager_id points to Jyoti)

p0_bug_fix_verification.issue: Agents/Managers couldn't see loans when bank names in user assignments don't match bank names in loans (e.g., 'YES' vs 'YES BANK')
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: build_rbac_filter now returns simple created_by filters without bank/cat/prod filtering
p0_bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Dhruvi (assigned_banks=['YES']) can see loan with bank='YES BANK'

seed_data_creation: Test loan created with bank='ICICI BANK' (not in Dhruvi's assigned_banks) - cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bank name mismatch bug fix verified. The fix changes build_rbac_filter (lines 314-326 in server.py) to use simple created_by filters instead of complex bank/cat/prod filtering. Dhruvi (agent) has 2 loans: one with bank='YES BANK' and one with bank='SBI'. Jyoti (manager) is Dhruvi's manager and can see both loans. No mocked APIs.
